input.background: Would you use a one-sample, paired-sample, or independent-sample $t$ procedure in the following situations?
input.question: A lab technician obtains a specimen of known concentration from a reference lab. She tests the specimen 10 times using an assay kit and compares the calculated mean to that of the known standard.

specimen_concentration.value: Known concentration from the reference lab
specimen_concentration.description: The known concentration of the specimen provided by the reference lab.

assay_results.value: Results of 10 tests conducted by the lab technician using the assay kit
assay_results.description: The calculated concentrations obtained from the lab technician's tests using the assay kit.

mean_assay_results.value: Mean concentration calculated from the 10 assay results
mean_assay_results.description: The average concentration calculated from the 10 assay results.

known_standard_mean.value: Mean concentration of the known standard
known_standard_mean.description: The mean concentration of the known standard provided by the reference lab.
